seoDescription: Vielumi Global helps cross-border e-commerce teams improve TikTok Shop operations, AI content production, marketing analytics, product research, and workflow automation.
heroLead: Vielumi Global helps e-commerce teams improve TikTok Shop operations, AI video production, advertising analysis, product research, and workflow automation.
aboutIntro: Vielumi Global is a cross-border e-commerce operation and marketing technology company. We combine hands-on commerce experience with practical technology to make complex work clearer, faster, and more measurable.
mission: To help e-commerce teams make better operating decisions and build repeatable growth systems across content, commerce, and data.
howWeWork: We start with business goals, organize the right signals, and turn them into practical workflows that teams can understand and use.
whoWeSupport: Brands, sellers, and e-commerce operators working across international markets and fast-moving social commerce channels.
contactTitle: Let’s build a clearer path to growth.
contactLead: Tell us about your market, operating challenge, or technology requirement. We will respond through the appropriate business channel.
